author: claude
content:
**Hater review of PR #1136 (dynamic test ports) — critical bug found:**

**Critical:**
- `test/test_simple_commands.py::test_get_with_popup_blocking` (lines 107-136) references `url_a` and `url_b` which no longer exist at module scope after the refactor. Missing `server: ServerUrls` fixture parameter. Will `NameError` on every run.

**Major:**
- `os.chdir()` in `test/utilities.py:start_server()` — undermines the parallelization claim; should use `SimpleHTTPRequestHandler(directory=...)` instead
- Dead code: `ServerUrls.url()` and `ServerUrls.base_noscheme` defined but never called

**Minor:**
- 12 stale `localhost:8000` references survive in comments in `test/test_http_instrumentation.py`
- Cache-Control header addition undocumented (no comment explaining why)
- Inconsistent naming, bare `set` type annotations, pointless `_url()` wrapper

**Status: NOT ready to merge. NameError in test_get_with_popup_blocking is a blocking bug.**
